message:
skill-loop pass 5/10: share model detection prelude

## Change: share lowercase non-empty prelude

### Equivalence contract

- Inputs covered: program, model, broadcast, and descriptive-name classifier helpers.

- Ordering preserved: yes; detect_agent_name_mistake ordering is unchanged.

- Tie-breaking: unchanged; final classifier predicates are unchanged.

- Error semantics: unchanged; boolean results feed the same exact message text.

- Laziness: unchanged.

- Short-circuit eval: unchanged at caller classification order.

- Floating-point: N/A.

- RNG / hash order: unchanged.

- Observable side-effects: none.

### Verification

- cargo fmt --check

- git diff --check

- cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core models::tests:: --locked

- cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets

- cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets -- -D warnings

- ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/models.rs (no critical findings)

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 # Total Passes: 10
 # Started: 2026-04-25T01:08:13Z
 
-## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 5 of 10
+## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 6 of 10
 
 ## Architecture Summary
 - Workspace is a Rust 2024 Cargo workspace with strict layering: `core` owns config/models/errors/metrics; `db` owns SQLite schema/query/cache/search persistence; `storage` owns Git archive and commit coalescing; `tools` owns the MCP tool implementations; `server` owns stdio/HTTP dispatch, TUI/web/ATC/runtime workers; `cli` owns `am`, robot mode, operator commands, gates, E2E, and benchmarks.
@@ -56,3 +56,11 @@
 - Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection passed; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core config::tests:: --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/config.rs` ran and reported false-positive criticals on environment-variable names such as `HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN`/`HTTP_JWT_SECRET`, while its fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks were clean.
 - Commit: `7a321d1e`.
 - Verdict: PRODUCTIVE.
+
+### Pass 5 - Core Model Detection Helper Simplification - 2026-04-25T02:25:00Z
+- Files changed: `crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/models.rs`.
+- Changes: added private `lowercase_non_empty` and reused it in `looks_like_program_name`, `looks_like_model_name`, `looks_like_broadcast`, and `looks_like_descriptive_name`.
+- Preservation notes: each changed helper still trims, rejects empty input, lowercases ASCII, and then applies the same final predicate; `looks_like_email`, `looks_like_unix_username`, vocabulary arrays, generated-name logic, classification order, and help/error text were untouched.
+- Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection passed; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core models::tests:: --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/models.rs` reported no critical findings.
+- Commit: pending.
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE.

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+# Pass 5 - Core Model Detection Helper Simplification
+
+## Change
+
+The four agent-name mistake classifiers that share the same trim,
+empty-check, and ASCII-lowercase prelude now call `lowercase_non_empty`.
+
+## Isomorphism Card
+
+- Inputs covered: program-name, model-name, broadcast-token, and descriptive
+  role-name detection helpers.
+- Ordering preserved: yes; `detect_agent_name_mistake` call order is unchanged.
+- Error semantics: unchanged; the functions still return booleans only, and
+  the caller's exact message text was not touched.
+- Case/whitespace behavior: unchanged; each helper still trims first, rejects
+  empty input, and lowercases with `to_ascii_lowercase`.
+- Observable side effects: none.
+- Exclusions: email detection, Unix username detection, vocabulary arrays, and
+  generated-name logic were intentionally untouched.
+
+## Verification
+
+- `cargo fmt --check` - passed.
+- `git diff --check` - passed.
+- `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core models::tests:: --locked` - passed, 71 tests.
+- `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets` - passed.
+- `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets -- -D warnings` - passed.
+- `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/models.rs` - no critical findings.
